This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-5cj2-3jr2-5h77. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.2 contains an inline-eval bypass vulnerability allowing authenticated operators to weaken strict allowlist checks via shell positional parameters. Attackers can combine allowlisted tools with shell positional arguments to place inline-eval content in shell carriers outside intended allowlist rules, enabling execution of unapproved shell-provided content.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-27pq-2ph8-8x25", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:11:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-27pq-2ph8-8x25", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-27pq-2ph8-8x25"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:02Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:31:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-5cj2-3jr2-5h77", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53855", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-shell-positional-parameters-bypass-in-inline-eval-checks", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-27pq-2ph8-8x25"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Shell positional parameters could weaken strict inline-eval checks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:11:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-27pq-2ph8-8x25", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:11:47Z"}
